first_run.rationale: The score is identical (2/10) in both evaluations. The reasoning is also substantively the same, focusing on the candidate's lack of Japanese language skills and specific experience in embedded networking security, which are stated hard requirements for the role. The change in work location from various international cities to the United States did not alter the model's assessment of the candidate's core qualifications. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation.
